requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Acceptance & Charge Documentation in Chile (no EU-style F-Gas phase-down regime)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R-600a可燃制冷剂在智利的接受度及充注量文件（无类EU氟气体削减制度）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——R-600a可燃製冷劑在智利的接受度及充注量文件（無類EU氟氣體削減制度）

summary.en: Chile accepts R-600a (isobutane, GWP approximately 3) as the standard refrigerant for household refrigerators, and R-600a units are widely sold. Safety of flammable-refrigerant appliances is handled through the SEC electrical-safety certification: the NCh IEC 60335-2-24 standard (the same IEC 60335-2-24 basis used in the EU and China) includes the flammable-refrigerant requirements (charge limits, ventilation, ignition-source controls) that the appliance must meet. Chile does not operate an EU-style mandatory F-Gas phase-down regulation that prohibits or quota-restricts HFCs at product level; instead Chile manages HFCs through its obligations under the Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol (administered by the Ministry of the Environment, Ministerio del Medio Ambiente) at the bulk-import/quota level rather than as a per-product market-access prohibition. For the manufacturer, the practical requirements are: declare the refrigerant designation (R-600a) and charge quantity in grams in the product documentation, and demonstrate that the R-600a charge meets the NCh IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant limits.
summary.zh: 智利接受R-600a（异丁烷，GWP约为3）作为家用电冰箱的标准制冷剂，R-600a机型被广泛销售。可燃制冷剂器具的安全通过SEC电气安全认证处理：NCh IEC 60335-2-24标准（与欧盟和中国所用的IEC 60335-2-24基础相同）包含器具须满足的可燃制冷剂要求（充注量限值、通风、点火源控制）。智利没有类EU的、在产品层面禁止或配额限制HFC的强制氟气体削减法规；智利通过《蒙特利尔议定书基加利修正案》项下的义务（由环境部Ministerio del Medio Ambiente管理）在散装进口/配额层面管理HFC，而非作为逐产品的市场准入禁令。对制造商而言，实务要求为：在产品文件中声明制冷剂名称（R-600a）及充注量（克），并证明R-600a充注量符合NCh IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂限值。
summary.zht: 智利接受R-600a（異丁烷，GWP約為3）作為家用電冰箱的標準製冷劑，R-600a機型被廣泛銷售。可燃製冷劑器具的安全通過SEC電氣安全認證處理：NCh IEC 60335-2-24標準（與歐盟和中國所用的IEC 60335-2-24基礎相同）包含器具須滿足的可燃製冷劑要求（充注量限值、通風、點火源控制）。智利沒有類EU的、在產品層面禁止或配額限制HFC的強制氟氣體削減法規；智利通過《蒙特利爾議定書基加利修正案》項下的義務（由環境部Ministerio del Medio Ambiente管理）在散裝進口/配額層面管理HFC，而非作為逐產品的市場准入禁令。對製造商而言，實務要求為：在產品文件中聲明製冷劑名稱（R-600a）及充注量（克），並證明R-600a充注量符合NCh IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑限值。

standards_or_laws: NCh IEC 60335-2-24 — flammable-refrigerant requirements for household refrigerating appliances (charge limits, ventilation, ignition-source controls; INN adoption of IEC 60335-2-24)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — Chile HFC phase-down obligations administered by Ministerio del Medio Ambiente at bulk-import/quota level (not a per-product market-access prohibition)
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification (R-600a classified A3: lower flammability)

summary.en: China addresses flammable-refrigerant safety for household appliances within GB 4706.13-2014 (which incorporates the R-600a flammability provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24), supported by GB 9237 (Safety requirements for refrigerating systems, aligned with ISO 5149). China has not adopted an EU-style product-level F-Gas phase-down for HFCs; it operates an HFC phase-down under the Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol (ratified June 2021), administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEE). Chinese refrigerators are already overwhelmingly R-600a, so the refrigerant technology base aligns well with Chile.
summary.zh: 中国在GB 4706.13-2014（纳入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性规定）框架内处理家用器具的可燃制冷剂安全，并以GB 9237（制冷系统安全要求，参照ISO 5149）为支撑。中国未采用类EU的产品层面HFC氟气体削减；中国依据《蒙特利尔议定书基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准）执行HFC削减，由生态环境部（MEE）管理。中国电冰箱已绝大多数采用R-600a，故制冷剂技术基础与智利高度一致。
summary.zht: 中國在GB 4706.13-2014（納入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性規定）框架內處理家用器具的可燃製冷劑安全，並以GB 9237（製冷系統安全要求，參照ISO 5149）為支撐。中國未採用類EU的產品層面HFC氟氣體削減；中國依據《蒙特利爾議定書基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准）執行HFC削減，由生態環境部（MEE）管理。中國電冰箱已絕大多數採用R-600a，故製冷劑技術基礎與智利高度一致。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — flammable-refrigerant (R-600a) requirements for household refrigerating appliances (derived from IEC 60335-2-24)
GB 9237-2001 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps (aligned with ISO 5149)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — China HFC phase-down schedule (ratified June 2021, administered by MEE)

gap.en: For R-600a refrigerators the gap is mainly documentation and charge verification, not technology, and it is narrower than the EU case because Chile has no product-level F-Gas prohibition: (1) the product documentation submitted for SEC certification and to the importer must explicitly state the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane), the charge weight in grams, and the flammable-refrigerant safety precautions per NCh IEC 60335-2-24; (2) the R-600a charge must be verified against the NCh IEC 60335-2-24 limits for the relevant configuration, which the SEC safety certification already assesses — so a model certified to GB 4706.13 with a conforming R-600a charge is technically close, but the SEC certificate must still be obtained; (3) there is no EU-style per-product HFC ban to navigate; HFC management is at the national bulk-import/quota level under the Kigali Amendment, so an exporter does not face a Reg. 2024/573-style Annex-IV product prohibition in Chile. [NOTE: confirm current Chilean refrigerant-handling and any HFC import-quota implications with SEC and the Ministry of the Environment before shipment if any model uses an HFC rather than R-600a.]
gap.zh: 对于R-600a电冰箱，差距主要在于文件和充注量核实而非技术，且因智利无产品层面氟气体禁令而比EU情形更窄：（1）为SEC认证及向进口商提交的产品文件须明确说明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）、充注量（克）及依据NCh IEC 60335-2-24的可燃制冷剂安全注意事项；（2）R-600a充注量须针对相关配置依据NCh IEC 60335-2-24限值核实，而SEC安全认证已对此进行评估——因此按GB 4706.13认证且R-600a充注量合规的型号在技术上较为接近，但仍须取得SEC证书；（3）无类EU的逐产品HFC禁令需要应对；HFC管理在《基加利修正案》项下属国家散装进口/配额层面，故出口商在智利不面临类似法规2024/573附件IV的产品禁令。【注：若任何型号使用HFC而非R-600a，发货前向SEC及环境部确认现行智利制冷剂处理规定及任何HFC进口配额影响。】
gap.zht: 對於R-600a電冰箱，差距主要在於文件和充注量核實而非技術，且因智利無產品層面氟氣體禁令而比EU情形更窄：（1）為SEC認證及向進口商提交的產品文件須明確說明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）、充注量（克）及依據NCh IEC 60335-2-24的可燃製冷劑安全注意事項；（2）R-600a充注量須針對相關配置依據NCh IEC 60335-2-24限值核實，而SEC安全認證已對此進行評估——因此按GB 4706.13認證且R-600a充注量合規的型號在技術上較為接近，但仍須取得SEC證書；（3）無類EU的逐產品HFC禁令需要應對；HFC管理在《基加利修正案》項下屬國家散裝進口/配額層面，故出口商在智利不面臨類似法規2024/573附件IV的產品禁令。【註：若任何型號使用HFC而非R-600a，發貨前向SEC及環境部確認現行智利製冷劑處理規定及任何HFC進口配額影響。】

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at appliance level via NCh IEC 60335-2-24 (R-600a charge limits and flammable-refrigerant safety, assessed within SEC safety certification); no EU-style per-product F-Gas prohibition — HFCs managed at bulk-import/quota level under the Kigali Amendment by the Ministry of the Environment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 (R-600a charge limits); China HFC phase-down under the Kigali Amendment administered by MEE at national level

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is accepted and dominant in Chile, and Chile has no EU-style per-product F-Gas prohibition — HFCs are managed at the national bulk-import/quota level under the Kigali Amendment. The manufacturer's task is to declare the R-600a designation and charge weight and to verify the charge against NCh IEC 60335-2-24 limits, which are assessed within the SEC safety certification. Since Chinese refrigerators are already overwhelmingly R-600a, this is largely a documentation and certification step rather than a redesign.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a在智利被接受且占主导，智利没有类EU的逐产品氟气体禁令——HFC在《基加利修正案》项下属国家散装进口/配额层面管理。制造商的任务是声明R-600a名称及充注量，并针对NCh IEC 60335-2-24限值核实充注量，而该核实已包含在SEC安全认证内。由于中国电冰箱已绝大多数采用R-600a，这主要是文件和认证步骤而非重新设计。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a在智利被接受且佔主導，智利沒有類EU的逐產品氟氣體禁令——HFC在《基加利修正案》項下屬國家散裝進口/配額層面管理。製造商的任務是聲明R-600a名稱及充注量，並針對NCh IEC 60335-2-24限值核實充注量，而該核實已包含在SEC安全認證內。由於中國電冰箱已絕大多數採用R-600a，這主要是文件和認證步驟而非重新設計。
